---
name: Component Request
about: Request a new Flutter UI component
title: '[Component] '
labels: component-request
assignees: ''
---

## Component Name
What component would you like to see?

## Description
Describe the component and its use case.

## Reference
Links to similar components in other libraries, Material Design docs, or design mockups.

## Would you like to contribute this?
- [ ] Yes, I'd like to build this component
- [ ] No, I'm requesting it for someone else to build
